data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for per-owner/per-team compliance reporting.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for per-owner/per-team compliance reporting, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of this reporting. The linked use case mentions the need for compliance reporting but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: Per-owner/per-team compliance reporting is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
